creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Antoine Brodin from comment #8)

With an exp-run refused, what else is needed for a decision to be made on this PR?  mat@ said that I should test that "make index" works (it does) and I also did a poudriere-bulk dry run, which succeeded.

Please reach a decision on whether portmgr approves of the patch set from attachment #254635.
